title: pickpiff Key Holder for Wall Self Adhesive, Key Hooks with 8 Hooks Wall Mounted, Black Key Hangers No Drill for Living Room, Kitchen, Office
features: 【Strong & Durable】Crafted from sturdy metal with a rust-resistant coating, this key rack is built for long-lasting use. It holds keys, lanyards, or small accessories securely without bending
【Heavy Duty Adhesive】Equipped with high-strength adhesive that supports up to 6 kg when properly installed, ensuring your essentials stay in place
【Easy to Install】No drilling required. Simply peel off the cover, press onto the wall, and wait 24 hours before use. Quick and convenient mounting solution
【Wide Applications】Minimalist design complements hallways, kitchens, bedrooms, bathrooms, and offices. Ideal for keeping keys, wallets, and daily essentials organised
【Damage-Free Wall Mount】Leaves no holes or sticky residue when removed, keeping your walls clean and intact
